mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND status = 1
SELECT * FROM user WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND password = #{password} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (nickname, username, password, phone, credit_score, role, create_time, update_time, status) VALUES (#{nickname}, #{username}, #{password}, #{phone}, #{creditScore}, #{role}, NOW(), NOW(), 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET nickname = #{nickname}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, phone = #{phone}, credit_score = #{creditScore}, role = #{role}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT balance FROM user WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET balance = balance - #{amount} WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET balance = balance + #{amount} WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET is_banned = false, ban_reason = NULL, ban_time = NULL, ban_end_time = NULL WHERE id = #{userId}
